summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Warzone Private Match Coordination Hub (Rally Point) with updated requirements. All backend APIs and frontend UI features tested successfully including Verdansk-only setup, 50 min players, strict one-way transitions, match code locking, and progressive readiness UI.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/sessions creates session with hardcoded map_name=Verdansk, game_mode=Battle Royale, min_players=50, max_players=150
Backend: GET /api/sessions correctly ignores map_name parameter
Backend: Player state transitions enforce one-way only (interested→joining→in_lobby, backward transitions rejected with 400)
Backend: Session status transitions enforce one-way only (filling→starting→in_progress→ended, backward transitions rejected with 400)
Frontend: Create Session dialog has only title, match code, region fields (map select, game mode select, min players input correctly removed)
Frontend: Filter bar has only region and status filters (map filter correctly removed)
Frontend: Session cards show 'Verdansk' as static label
Frontend: Session detail page shows 'Verdansk Private Match' header
Frontend: Session progress shows '/50 ready' as min players threshold
Frontend: Match code LOCKED for interested players (shows lock icon and message)
Frontend: Match code UNLOCKED and visible after player commits to joining
Frontend: Progressive readiness UI - shows only next action (I'm Interested → Commit to Joining → I'm In The Lobby)
Frontend: Host controls show only next valid status action (filling→Start Match, starting→In Progress)
Frontend: In Lobby state shows green status with no further action buttons
Integration: Real-time WebSocket updates working (player counts, status changes)
Integration: Frontend-Backend API communication working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and flows tested successfully)
